calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne M. Collins, for petitioner Borgny Steinsmith.

Mr. Collins advised the Court that he will be efiling the verification and proposed order within the next week. The Court stated that the matter will be deemed submitted as of November 7, 2016.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Continued To Aug-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Collins, attorney for personal representative Borgny Steinsmith; Sarah Boone.

Mr. Collins informed the Court that he had completed the acccounting and was filing it today. He added that he expected to file the Inventroy and Appraisal today as well. He provided the completed accounting to the Court. The status hearing was ordered off calendar by the Court.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jun-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Collins for (executor) Borgny Steinsmith.

Mr. Collins reported on the Chase account stated that the records only showed the name of the decedent, that there was no record of joint tenancy, that there was $4.00 in the account which was escheated to the state, that the state has no record of it, that the executor can sign a waiver of accounting, that the daughter has power of attorney and will sign and requested a 2 month continuance. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal and a petition for final distribution was continued to June 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Court stated that if the petition is not of file at that time it does not know what the options will be.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Continued To May-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Collins for Borgny Steinsmith.

Mr. Collins reported that the executrix is in an assisted living facility in Dixon, that Chase bank will not speak to him without a Power of Attorney, that it has taken 3 trips to Dixon to get one signed, that they are in need of the origination documents from Chase bank to determine how the account was held and that he can now go to Chase and obtain the information. The status on filing an Inventory & Appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to May 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Continued To Mar-28-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Collins for (executor) Borgny Steinsmith.

Mr. Collins stated that he went to the bank to obtain information but could not obtain such with the letters testamentary, was told that he would need a Power of Attorney, that he and the executor will go to the bank together to get the information and that he will need 60 days to complete the petition. The status on filing and Inventory & Appraisal and a petition for final distribution was continued to March 28, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order Of Status Hearing [Order To Appear}
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Continued To Feb-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Continued To Jan-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on January 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal and petition for final distribution have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court received an earlier message indicating that Mr. Collins was en route but stuck in traffic. The status of filing an Inventory & Appraisal and a Petition for Final Distribution was continued to December 7, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, with the expectation of the documents being filed prior to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Continued To Nov-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of I&A And Pet'N For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne Collins for Borgny Steinsmith.

When this matter was called there was no appearance and an Order to Appear was to be issued to the attorney and executor. Mr. Collins subsequently appeared and reported that the delay was due to his office failing to scan the inventory and appraisal and then misplacing the document, that he will have his client sign a duplicate this week and requested a 30 day continuance to be able to give notice. The Court stated that it will set aside the Order to Appear that was to be issued and the status of filing an inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to October 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
